---
title:    "🚀 ReaLM-Retrieve v1.0.0 is live — SIGIR '26 camera-ready"
category: announcements
pin:      true
lock:     true
---

We just shipped **ReaLM-Retrieve v1.0.0**, the camera-ready release that
accompanies our SIGIR 2026 paper *"When to Retrieve During Reasoning:
Adaptive Retrieval for Large Reasoning Models"*.

## Headline numbers

- **71.2 F1** on MuSiQue with only **1.8 retrieval calls per question** —
  +5.8 F1 over IRCoT, **47 % fewer retrievals**, *p < 0.01* (paired
  bootstrap, 10K iter, Bonferroni-corrected).
- **CPU-friendly quickstart** runs end-to-end in < 2 minutes on a laptop:
  `make quickstart`.
- **Lazy-imported backends** — `import realm_retrieve.models.*` works on
  CPU-only / API-only environments.

## What's in the box

| Stage                | Module                                                                                 |
|----------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Step segmenter       | [`models/segmentation.py`](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/blob/main/src/realm_retrieve/models/segmentation.py) — 3-layer transformer, 94.2 F1 |
| RSUS                 | [`models/rsus.py`](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/blob/main/src/realm_retrieve/models/rsus.py) — α·U_verb + β·U_ent + γ·U_cons             |
| REINFORCE policy     | [`models/policy.py`](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/blob/main/src/realm_retrieve/models/policy.py)                                          |
| ColBERTv2 + PLAID    | [`models/retriever.py`](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/blob/main/src/realm_retrieve/models/retriever.py)                                    |
| LRM adapter          | [`models/reasoning_model.py`](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/blob/main/src/realm_retrieve/models/reasoning_model.py) — DeepSeek-R1 / o1 / QwQ |

- 📖 [Wiki](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/wiki) — long-form architecture, reproducibility, FAQ, glossary.

- 💬 [General](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/discussions/categories/general) — say hi.
- 📝 [Citation](https://github.com/bettyguo/realm-retrieve/wiki/Citation) — BibTeX + plain text + `CITATION.cff`.
